REMOVED FROM UD JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-11-2013. COUNSELS AND LITIGANTS REPORT TO JUDGE PRO TEM FOR SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. COUNSELS CONFER AMONGST THEMSELVES - CASE SETTLED. PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH WAS FILED. (501)

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-11-2013 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Luz Hotel is present. Represented by Virgilio Candari.
Attorney Michael McCloskey appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peggy Lenoir is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deb Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar. After checking in plaintiff left the settlement conference complaining of chest pains. Judge Pro Tem Schweizer directs plaintiff's counsel to have plaintiff bring documentation from medical provider indicating the medical emergency to the next hearing.

The trial date of MAR-11-2013 remains on calendar.
